title: Worktree + Task Isolation
description: Use a shared task board with optional worktree lanes for clean parallel execution

zh.description: 使用共享任务看板和可选的 worktree 通道实现干净的并行执行

steps.content: 并行实现认证重构和登录 UI 更新
steps.annotation: 在同一工作区中的两个活跃任务会相互冲突

steps.content:
task_create(subject: "认证重构")
task_create(subject: "登录 UI 优化")
steps.annotation: 共享看板仍然是协调的唯一真实来源

steps.content:
worktree_create(name: "auth-refactor", task_id: 1)
worktree_create(name: "ui-login")
task_bind_worktree(task_id: 2, worktree: "ui-login")
steps.annotation: 通道分配和任务关联是可组合的；任务 2 在通道创建后绑定
控制平面状态保持规范；钩子式消费者可以响应生命周期事件，无需持有规范状态写入权

steps.content:
worktree_run(name: "auth-refactor", command: "pytest tests/auth -q")
worktree_run(name: "ui-login", command: "npm test -- login")
steps.annotation: 在此教学运行时中，命令按通道限定的工作目录路由；其他运行时可能使用会话级目录切换

steps.content:
worktree_keep(name: "ui-login")
worktree_remove(name: "auth-refactor", complete_task: true)
worktree_events(limit: 10)
steps.annotation: 收尾是显式的工具驱动状态转换：在一次操作中混合保留/删除决策并查询生命周期事件

steps.content:
ui-login 的 worktree.keep 事件已发出
auth-refactor 的 worktree.remove.before/after 事件已发出
task.completed 事件已为 #1 发出
.worktrees/events.jsonl 已追加
steps.annotation: 生命周期转换成为显式记录，而任务/worktree 文件仍为数据真实来源

steps.content: 任务看板负责协调，worktree 负责隔离。并行轨道保持干净且可审计。
steps.annotation: 在一个看板中协调，只在需要时按通道隔离，并从生命周期事件中运行可选的策略/审计副作用

ja.description: クリーンな並行実行のための共有タスクボードとオプションの worktree レーン

steps.content: 認証リファクタリングとログイン UI 更新を並行して実装してください
steps.annotation: 1つのワークスペースでの2つのアクティブなタスクは衝突する

steps.content:
task_create(subject: "認証リファクタリング")
task_create(subject: "ログイン UI ポリッシュ")
steps.annotation: 共有ボードが調整の唯一の信頼できる情報源として残る

steps.content:
worktree_create(name: "auth-refactor", task_id: 1)
worktree_create(name: "ui-login")
task_bind_worktree(task_id: 2, worktree: "ui-login")
steps.annotation: レーン割り当てとタスク関連付けは組み合わせ可能；タスク 2 はレーン作成後にバインド
コントロールプレーンの状態が正規の状態として残る；フック式コンシューマーはライフサイクルイベントに反応できる

steps.content:
worktree_run(name: "auth-refactor", command: "pytest tests/auth -q")
worktree_run(name: "ui-login", command: "npm test -- login")
steps.annotation: この教育用ランタイムでは、コマンドはレーンスコープの作業ディレクトリによってルーティングされる

steps.content:
worktree_keep(name: "ui-login")
worktree_remove(name: "auth-refactor", complete_task: true)
worktree_events(limit: 10)
steps.annotation: クローズアウトは明示的なツール駆動の状態遷移：保持/削除の決定を混在させ、ライフサイクルイベントを一度に照会

steps.content:
ui-login の worktree.keep が発出
auth-refactor の worktree.remove.before/after が発出
task #1 の task.completed が発出
.worktrees/events.jsonl に追記
steps.annotation: ライフサイクル遷移が明示的なレコードになり、タスク/worktree ファイルが信頼できる情報源として残る

steps.content: タスクボードが調整を担い、worktree が分離を担います。並行トラックはクリーンで監査可能な状態に保たれます。
steps.annotation: 1つのボードで調整し、必要な場合のみレーンで分離し、ライフサイクルイベントからオプションのポリシー/監査副作用を実行

steps.content: Implement auth refactor and login UI updates in parallel
steps.annotation: Two active tasks in one workspace would collide

steps.content:
task_create(subject: "Auth refactor")
task_create(subject: "Login UI polish")
steps.annotation: Shared board remains the coordination source of truth

steps.content:
worktree_create(name: "auth-refactor", task_id: 1)
worktree_create(name: "ui-login")
task_bind_worktree(task_id: 2, worktree: "ui-login")
steps.annotation: Lane allocation and task association are composable; task 2 binds after lane creation
Control-plane state remains canonical; hook-style consumers can react to lifecycle events without owning canonical state writes

steps.content:
worktree_run(name: "auth-refactor", command: "pytest tests/auth -q")
worktree_run(name: "ui-login", command: "npm test -- login")
steps.annotation: In this teaching runtime, commands route by lane-scoped cwd; other runtimes may use session-level directory switches. The invariant is explicit execution context.

steps.content:
worktree_keep(name: "ui-login")
worktree_remove(name: "auth-refactor", complete_task: true)
worktree_events(limit: 10)
steps.annotation: Closeout is explicit tool-driven state transition: mix keep/remove decisions and query lifecycle events in one pass

steps.content:
worktree.keep emitted for ui-login
worktree.remove.before/after emitted for auth-refactor
task.completed emitted for #1
.worktrees/events.jsonl appended
steps.annotation: Lifecycle transitions become explicit records while task/worktree files remain source-of-truth

steps.content: Task board handles coordination, worktrees handle isolation. Parallel tracks stay clean and auditable.
steps.annotation: Coordinate in one board, isolate by lane only where needed, and run optional policy/audit side effects from lifecycle events
